name: lattice
description: Composable AI skills framework covering the full software delivery lifecycle — design, architecture, implementation, testing, and review.

interface.shortDescription: Composable SDLC skills — design, architecture, implementation, testing, and review
interface.longDescription: Lattice is a composable AI skills framework for the full software delivery lifecycle. Install once to get structured workflows for requirement analysis, design-first thinking, architecture enforcement, domain-driven design, clean code, secure coding, test quality, and code review. Skills compose — atoms combine into molecules for complete SDLC workflows.
defaultPrompt: Design a new feature using the design-first approach.
Review this code for quality, architecture, and security.
Help me write clean, well-structured implementation code.
